articles.title: Air India Announces Resignation Of CEO Campbell Wilson
articles.description: Air India announced the resignation of Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director, Campbell Wilson on Tuesday, April 7.

articles.title: 'Need gau bhakt society': RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat on how to stop cow slaughter
articles.description: Bhagwat said that while those in power at present have the intention to end cow slaughter, they would need to raise awareness in society.

articles.title: No exit polls from 7 am of April 9 till 6.30 pm of April 29: EC ahead of elections
articles.description: The EC cautioned that conducting or broadcasting exit polls in the period is violative of section 126A of the Representation of the People Act, 1951.

articles.title: Internet cut in 5 Manipur districts amid protest, security clampdown over 2 kids' death
articles.description: Protests have erupted in Manipur over the death an infant and a five-year old in a suspected rocket strike on a house in Manipur’s Bishnupur early Tuesday.

articles.title: ‘Military action is not an effective means to pursue nonproliferation’
articles.description: 'We’re now seeing very concerning strikes on nuclear facilities in Iran that risk further radioactive contamination.'

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Elon Musk: ‘…work harder than you thought possible’
topStories.description: Elon Musk, born in South Africa in 1971, moved to Canada as a teenager and later to the US. He co-founded Zip2, X.com, and founded SpaceX and Tesla, becoming a key figure in electric vehicles and AI, known for his influential and controversial business ventures.

topStories.title: How CIA Tricked Iran To Rescue Downed F-15 Crew In High-Stakes Mission
topStories.description: More than 150 aircraft took part in the operation. A specialised commando unit carried out the ground rescue under significant air cover, with US jets conducting strikes to hold back Iranian forces...

topStories.description: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge said Assam’s people respect their culture and traditions and do not want an arrogant and rude chief minister

dailyNews.title: Iran says US-Israeli projectile has struck a synagogue in Tehran
dailyNews.description: A US-Israeli strike has caused extensive damage to a synagogue in Tehran, according to a video by Mehr News.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war: Will Trump extend his Hormuz deadline again? What US officials say as clock ticks down
dailyNews.description: Despite Trump's rather forceful threats, Iran has remained defiant, with the country's foreign ministry on Monday clarifying that it would not adhere to deadlines or be pressured to act. Less than 24 hours now remain. Will Trump extend the Tuesday night deadline? Here's what US officials are saying.

dailyNews.title: The Strait of Hormuz is ‘open': Viral video claims Pete Hegseth's awkward moment; Iran reacts
dailyNews.description: A viral video of Pete Hegseth allegedly passing gas during a press briefing has sparked debate and humor online. The incident occurred while discussing a US pilot rescue operation in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed candidate aims to pad GOP's fragile House majority battle in showdown for MTG's seat
dailyNews.description: Clay Fuller says Georgia's special election runoff is crucial as the GOP fights to protect its slim House majority against Democrat Shawn Harris.

dailyNews.title: MORNING GLORY: Will President Trump go full Sherman in the war on Iran?
dailyNews.description: From Sherman's march to Trump's Iran deadline, a historical argument emerges for why ruthless wartime measures can ultimately deliver lasting peace.

dailyNews.title: STEVE FORBES: Europe’s attacks on US tech firms must stop. We have just the way to do it
dailyNews.description: Europe's digital trade policies unfairly target American tech giants like Apple, Google and Meta, and a Section 301 investigation is long overdue.

dailyNews.title: LIZ PEEK: Progressive hypocrisy revealed by Cesar Chavez sexual abuse revelations
dailyNews.description: From Cesar Chavez to Jeffrey Epstein, Democrats face accusations of hypocrisy for ignoring sexual abuse claims against politically allied figures.

dailyNews.title: Dem Senate primary erupts in key state as candidate teams up with radical streamer: 'America deserved 9/11'
dailyNews.description: Abdul El-Sayed draws fire from fellow Democrats and a GOP challenger for holding Michigan campus rallies with controversial progressive streamer Hasan Piker.

dailyNews.title: Trump commandeers Cabinet members to campaign in midterms, ordering them to drop or mute controversial stances
dailyNews.description: Trump is deploying Cabinet members to push popular agenda items and minimize GOP losses in the midterms – but how likely is a massive blue wave in the first place?

dailyNews.title: Michigan holds off UConn to capture first men's basketball national title since 1989
dailyNews.description: Michigan defeated UConn to claim the men's basketball national championship, ending a title drought dating back to 1989 in a gritty NCAA Tournament final.

dailyNews.title: Nutella capitalizes on greatest free advertising moment in history on NASA Moon mission
dailyNews.description: A floating Nutella jar aboard NASA's Artemis II went viral, with internet users calling the zero-gravity moment the greatest free advertisement in history.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s 10-Point Proposal Demands an End to Attacks and Sanctions
dailyNews.description: As President Trump’s deadline for new attacks loomed, Iran conveyed its conditions through Pakistani intermediaries.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth Likens Easter Rescue of U.S. Airman to Resurrection of Jesus Christ
dailyNews.description: President Trump also asserted that God supports the American war against Iran “because God is good, and God wants to see people taken care of.”

dailyNews.title: Artemis II Astronauts Head Home After Historic Journey Around the Moon
dailyNews.description: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Pulls Out of Civil Rights Settlements Backing Trans Students
dailyNews.description: The Education Department said there was no precedent for the federal government terminating settlements stemming from civil rights investigations into schools.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Clears the Way for Dismissal of Steve Bannon’s Conviction
dailyNews.description: Stephen K. Bannon, a former close aide to President Trump, was convicted for failing to comply with a congressional subpoena related to the investigation into the Jan. 6 attack.

dailyNews.title: BNY and Robinhood Will Help Run ‘Trump Accounts’ for Children
dailyNews.description: The new tax-sheltered savings and investment accounts will start accepting deposits this summer.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s Endorsement in California Could Backfire Against Republicans
dailyNews.description: President Trump endorsed Steve Hilton, a Republican, in the governor’s race, which could help Democrats avoid being shut out of the general election.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns of "critical period" in Iran war as deadline to avoid escalation looms
dailyNews.description: President Trump's deadline for Iran to reach a deal to end the war or face punishing strikes on its bridges and power plants is less than 24 hours away.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Artemis II astronauts "modern-day pioneers" in live conversation
dailyNews.description: President Trump praised the crew of NASA's Artemis II mission in a brief chat late Monday, saying they had "inspired the entire world" after they looped around the moon in a record-breaking voyage.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Trump calls Artemis II crew, congratulates them on historic trip around moon
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke with the crew of the Artemis II mission on Monday as they capped off a historic day that saw them loop around the far side of the moon and begin their return to Earth.

dailyNews.title: 4/6: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump sheds new light on mission to rescue F-16 crew members in Iran; Artemis II sets record for farthest distance travelled from Earth.

dailyNews.title: Decorated F-16 fighter pilot describes what went into mission to rescue U.S. airmen from Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is hailing the rescue of a downed weapons system officer as one of the most complex missions the U.S. military has ever attempted. Lt. Col. Dan Rooney, a decorated F-16 fighter pilot and combat veteran, joins CBS News to discuss.
